name: CONTRAST NEPHROPATHY
definition: CONTRAST-INDUCED RENAL FAILURE increase in serum creatinine of ≥ 1 mg/dL ± 25-50% of baseline creatinine level after
dominant_finding: cortical attenuation > 140 HU on CT after 24-hour delay
distribution: cortical attenuation > 140 HU on CT after 24-hour delay
discriminating_features: cortical attenuation > 140 HU on CT after 24-hour delay

general: cortical attenuation > 140 HU on CT after 24-hour delay
